text:
In the first image, I feel a sense of anticipation and slight separation. Observing others through glass evokes the feeling of being an outsider looking into the activities and conversations within—a meditation on inclusion and distance.

In the second image, I am surrounded by vibrant colors and the allure of innovation. The display’s focus on research and development energizes me, sparking curiosity about humanity’s evolving relationship with technology. I feel inspired and eager to explore the ideas presented.
